typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{Complex Id} as string,
		{Facility Id} as string,
		{Carrier Visit Id} as string,
		Phase as string,
		{Visit Nbr} as string,
		{Carrier Mode} as string,
		ATA as string,
		ATD as string,
		ETA as string,
		ETD as string,
		{Operator Line Id} as string,
		{Operator Line Role} as string,
		{Operator Line Name} as string,
		{Time First Availabilty} as string,
		{Time Discharge Complete} as string,
		{Service Id} as string,
		{Service Name} as string,
		{Vessel Id} as string,
		{IB VYG} as string,
		{OB VYG} as string,
		{Carrier Name} as string,
		{Vessel Class} as string,
		{Published ETA} as string,
		{Published ETD} as string,
		STARTWORK as string,
		ENDWORK as string,
		{Begin Receive_Date} as string,
		{Cargo Cutoff Date} as string,
		{Hazard Cutoff Date} as string,
		{Reefer Cutoff Date} as string,
		{Labor On Board Date} as string,
		{Labor Off Board Date} as string,
		{Off Port Arrival Date} as string,
		{Off Port Departure} as string,
		{Pilot On Board Date} as string,
		{Pilot Off Board Date} as string,
		{Est BBK Discharge} as string,
		{Est BBK Load} as string,
		{Est Load} as string,
		{Est Discharge} as string,
		{Est Restow} as string,
		{Est Shift} as string,
		vvFlexString01 as string,
		vvFlexString02 as string,
		vvFlexString03 as string,
		vvFlexString04 as string,
		vvFlexString05 as string,
		vvFlexString06 as string,
		vvFlexString07 as string,
		vvFlexString08 as string,
		vvFlexDate01 as string,
		vvFlexDate02 as string,
		vvFlexDate03 as string,
		vvFlexDate04 as string,
		vvFlexDate05 as string,
		vvFlexDate06 as string,
		vvFlexDate07 as string,
		vvFlexDate08 as string,
		{Carrier Visit Key} as string,
		{Vessel Classification} as string,
		{Vessel Class Length Overall cm} as string,
		{Vessel Class Beam cm} as string,
		{Vessel TEU Capacity} as string,
		{Lloyds Code} as string
	),
	useSchema: false,
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: true,
	moveFiles: ['bronze/vesselvisits/load','bronze/vesselvisits/archive'],
	format: 'delimited',
	fileSystem: 'malta',
	folderPath: 'bronze/vesselvisits/load/',
	columnDelimiter: ',',
	escapeChar: '\\',
	quoteChar: '\"',
	columnNamesAsHeader: true,
	dateFormats: ['dd-MM-yyyy'],
	timestampFormats: ['yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss.SSS\'Z\'','yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss\'Z\''],
	mode: 'read') ~> vesselvisits
Select2 select(mapColumn(
		each(match(true()),
			regexReplace($$,' ','_') = $$)
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> Select1
derivedColumn1 aggregate(groupBy(Hash_Col),
	each(match(name!='Hash_Col'), $$ = first($$))) ~> Aggregate1
vesselvisits select(mapColumn(
		each(match(/* All input columns */ true()),
			/* Input name */ $$ = $$)
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> Select2
filter1 alterRow(upsertIf(true())) ~> AlterRow1
Aggregate1 filter(not(isNull(Hash_Col))) ~> filter1
Select1 derive(Hash_Col = md5(
    toString(Carrier_Visit_Key) + 
    coalesce(ATA, '') + 
    coalesce(ATD, '') + 
    coalesce(ETA, '') + 
    coalesce(ETD, '') +
    coalesce(Phase, '')
)) ~> derivedColumn1
AlterRow1 sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'delta',
	fileSystem: 'malta',
	folderPath: 'silver/vesselvisits',
	mergeSchema: false,
	autoCompact: false,
	optimizedWrite: false,
	vacuum: 0,
	deletable: false,
	insertable: false,
	updateable: false,
	upsertable: true,
	keys:['Hash_Col'],
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> VesselVisit
